title: スプリンターズSの後に・次は満腹！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The people who came expecting a comedy show
are left in awe by the sheer power the two racers
put on display.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although first place eluded Hishi Akebono, she
seems to have raced with everything she had. I
can tell she's in good form.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We agree to have her run in the Mile
Championship, but before that, we decide to
take on the Swan Stakes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, as we celebrate and Taiki Shuttle is
beside herself with excitement in the stands, Biko
Pegasus mourns her loss.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race ends with a mix of emotional highs and
lows... and our attention now shifts to the Swan S.
